## Type

AFK / Human-in-the-loop / Review / QA

## Goal

What observable behavior must be true after this task?

## Scope

Allowed files, modules, or surfaces.

## Out of scope

What must not change in this task?

## Required workflow

- [ ] Read `AGENTS.md`.
- [ ] Read relevant ADRs, regression map, contract docs, and nearby tests when present.
- [ ] Add or update a failing test for non-trivial behavior.
- [ ] Implement the smallest change.
- [ ] Run targeted checks.
- [ ] Run broader checks required by `AGENTS.md`.
- [ ] Capture live Feishu E2E evidence when UI/routing/topic/lifecycle/Plan Mode/callback behavior changes.

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Criterion 1
- [ ] Criterion 2
- [ ] Criterion 3
